reviewer.displayName: Taller Patio de Alu - Hudson- Buenos Aires

reviews.comment:
Excelemte lugar de recreación. Arboleda. Asadores. Piscina. Tranquilidad. En el frente hay una estac de servicio ACA y en frente estación de trenes una estac antes de llegar a Luján. Socios y no socios

(Translated by Google)
Excellent recreational area. Tree-lined streets. Grills. Pool. Tranquility. There's an ACA gas station in front, and the train station just across the street before reaching Luján. Members and non-members welcome.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17556132376650976621/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvMnQ2SVNREAE
